summary: Reliability fixes for market data, cleaner chart visuals, and auto-update improvements.
release_notes: Float and country data now loads reliably on all systems — added a built-in fallback when the primary data source is unavailable.
Chart indicator lines (EMA 9/20/200, VWAP, MACD) no longer show labels on the price axis, keeping the chart cleaner.
Screener table columns and skeleton loading rows now always match your visible column layout.
Auto-update now works correctly — the app will detect and install new versions on startup.
Fixed an issue where the Analytics page could appear locked even without a subscription requirement.
